author: codex

scope.question: After excluding applied relation batches017-034 and missing-target repairs, decide the next best data cleanup bucket versus scoped validator rule patch for remaining unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape rows.
scope.write_scope_observed: Created exactly this prep artifact under data/review_notes/.

excluded_repairs: retired override reasons mentioning missing-target or target repair
exclusion_model.implementation: Read canonical records through readCanonicalRecords(), removed known batch017-034 and missing-target repair submission/record ids from retired overrides, batch prep files, and batch submission journals, then ran relationEndpointShapeIssue() in-process against the remaining relation records. This did not invoke the validate CLI.

remaining_bucket_counts_after_exclusions.tie_break_note: Four buckets tie at count 2. I recommend has_metric source->metric_claim because it is alphabetically first in the deterministic sorted inventory and has a direct precedent in applied batch022. A dirty-tree batch035 prep artifact already exists for the tied has_timeline_event claim->event bucket, but this task explicitly excluded only applied batches017-034, so batch035 was not excluded from this inventory.

recommendation.reason: The two remaining rows say the BudgetWatch source document has metrics. Current validator rules intentionally reserve has_metric for project, route, corridor, entity, event, or claim subjects pointing to metric_claim objects. A source-to-metric edge is document containment/reporting semantics, not a domain owner having a metric. Applied batch022 already used the coherent cleanup mechanism for this same malformed shape: retire has_metric source->metric_claim rows and replace them with includes source->metric_claim rows preserving the source-contained metric evidence.
recommendation.why_not_validator_rule_change: Widening has_metric to accept source subjects would blur metric ownership/context with source-document containment and would undo the semantics established by batch022. The in-process rule probe confirms includes source->metric_claim is accepted while has_metric source->metric_claim is rejected.

proposed_mechanism.replace_with: Two relation submissions with relation_kind includes, subject_local_observation_id source_budgetwatch_april2022, and the same metric object local ids/evidence refs.

representative_records.validator_message: Relation kind has_metric expects project|route|corridor|entity|event|claim -> metric_claim, got source -> metric_claim.

payload_summary.raw_value_text: $1,480.9 million actual vs $1,679.9 million budget, ($199.0) million diff, -11.8%

evidence.block_excerpt: YTD March 2022 ($ in millions) ... Operating Revenue 1 $1,480.9 $1,679.9 ($199.0) -11.8% ...

representative_records.validator_message: Relation kind has_metric expects project|route|corridor|entity|event|claim -> metric_claim, got source -> metric_claim.

payload_summary.raw_value_text: $274.6 million actual vs $214.9 million budget, ($59.8) million unfavorable, -27.8%

precedent_evidence.summary: Batch022 retired six malformed has_metric source->metric_claim submissions and appended includes source->metric_claim replacements. The retired override reason states that source subjects create endpoint-shape issues and includes preserves source-document containment semantics.

command_evidence.command: rg --files data/review_notes data/submissions data/submission-overrides | sort | rg 'relation.*(034)|batch034|missing.*target|target_repair|repair'
bun --eval '<readCanonicalRecords + relationEndpointShapeIssue inventory excluding batches017-034 and missing-target repairs>'
command_evidence.output_excerpt: excluded_submission_count=171; excluded_record_count=87; total=40; top buckets: has_metric source->metric_claim=2, has_timeline_event claim->event=2, implemented_by route->entity=2, part_of_program event->entity=2

p001_c0004 contains the YTD March 2022 operating revenue table with $1,480.9 actual vs $1,679.9 adopted budget; p003_c0004 contains the overtime table with Total $274.6 actual vs $214.9 adopted budget.

command_evidence.command: bun --eval '<print canonical records for relation_budgetwatch-has-metric-oper-rev, relation_budgetwatch-has-metric-overtime, source_meeting-doc-85751, metric_operating-revenue-ytd-mar2022, metric_total-overtime-ytd-mar2022>'
command_evidence.output_excerpt: Confirmed both relations have relation_kind has_metric with subject_id source_meeting-doc-85751 and metric_claim objects. The two metric claims carry MTA-wide BudgetWatch metric payloads and cite the same blocks as the relation evidence.

command_evidence.output:
has_metric source->metric_claim: Relation kind has_metric expects project|route|corridor|entity|event|claim -> metric_claim, got source -> metric_claim.
includes source->metric_claim: ok
related_to source->metric_claim: ok

command_evidence.output_excerpt: retired.json and the batch022 audit row describe replacing malformed has_metric source->metric_claim rows with includes source-to-metric relations preserving source-contained metric evidence; batch022 journal contains accepted includes replacements.
A dirty-tree batch035 prep artifact exists for the tied has_timeline_event claim->event bucket with prepared_count 2. It was not excluded because this assignment specified applied batches017-034.

command_evidence.output: No whitespace warnings printed; command exited 1 because --no-index reports differences for the added file.

commands_run: rg --files data/review_notes data/submissions data/submission-overrides | sort | rg 'relation.*(034)|batch034|missing.*target|target_repair|repair'
bun --eval '<first inventory attempt; failed due invalid regular expression before any write>'

rg -n "export function read|readCanonical|function readCanonical|readCanonicalRecords|export .*Records" packages/pipeline/src/materialize packages/pipeline/src/records packages/pipeline/src/validate.ts packages/db/src
bun --eval '<readCanonicalRecords + relationEndpointShapeIssue inventory excluding batches017-034 and missing-target repairs>'
bun --eval '<print canonical records for target BudgetWatch relations, source, and metrics>'
next_action: Prepare a narrow data cleanup batch, after conductor coordination on the dirty-tree batch035 artifact, retiring the two BudgetWatch has_metric source->metric_claim submissions and replacing them with includes source->metric_claim submissions. Do not mutate validator rules for this bucket.
